products.name: Block & Communal Area Cleaning
products.description: Regular scheduled cleaning of communal areas, stairwells, lobbies, bin rooms, and shared spaces in residential blocks. Includes stairwell mopping, lobby cleaning, bin room sanitisation, and handrail disinfection. Trusted by Rendall & Rittner and MVN Block Management.

products.name: Commercial Office Cleaning
products.description: Professional cleaning services for offices, retail spaces, and commercial premises. Includes desk cleaning, kitchen deep clean, bathroom sanitisation, floor care, and waste removal with recycling.

products.name: End of Tenancy Deep Clean
products.description: Comprehensive deep cleaning service to prepare properties for new tenants. Meets letting agent and landlord standards. Full kitchen deep clean, bathroom descaling, floor cleaning, and window cleaning included. 24-hour turnaround available.

products.name: Pressure Washing Service
products.description: High-pressure cleaning for external areas including car parks, pathways, driveways, and building exteriors. Water-efficient systems with eco-friendly cleaning solutions. Includes graffiti removal service.

products.name: Window Cleaning Service
products.description: Professional interior and exterior window cleaning for residential blocks and commercial premises. Using purified water systems for streak-free results without harmful chemicals.

products.name: Residential Deep Clean
products.description: Comprehensive deep cleaning for private homes, flats, and apartments. All-natural, eco-friendly products that are safe for children, pets, and allergy sufferers. Ex-Hilton Hotel trained staff ensuring 5-star cleaning standards.
